name: Artichoke Dip Appetizer
recipeIngredient: 2 small jars marinated artichoke hearts, drain well
recipeInstructions:
This appetizer is sure to be a crowd pleaser. Tear artichokes apart with your fingers. Cut up pita bread into triangle chips and bake on a cookie sheet until crispy (about 5 minutes). In a bowl or KitchenAid mixer, mash together all other ingredients. Place the mixture in an uncovered casserole dish and bake at 350°F for about 30 minutes, or until bubbly. Serve hot from the oven and enjoy with pita bread chips. If you plan to take this to a party or serve friends, be prepared to explain the recipe multiple times! My wife and I often bring xerox copies along.
(Note: The attribution line has been removed as per the instructions.)
